response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and strong open-source contributions in geospatial systems via GISCollective, which aligns with the role’s domain, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, tiling, or navigation pipelines — his C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy work, and he primarily uses DLang, TypeScript, and Node.js in production.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform used by NGOs
Strong track record in distributed systems, low-latency services, and CI/CD infrastructure
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, tiling, or navigation systems
Primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — minimal evidence of modern C++ systems programming
Limited evidence of distributed systems expertise in fault tolerance or consistency for global routing data
